title: Graphql - update multiple items
excerpt: Is there a way to update multiple items in a board, or do we just run the change_column_value() mutation multiple times?

posts.author: iateadonut (Donal)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to update multiple items in a board, or do we just run the change_column_value() mutation multiple times?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, there is no way to update multiple items at a time, though it is something the monday.com plans to support in the future. You will have to run the mutation multiple times.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
